allow:
Bash(PRE_COMMIT_ALLOW_NO_CONFIG=1 git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: preserve turn state on token refresh failure to avoid re-requesting preoperacionales

Remove deleteAccessTokenByUsername calls from AccessTokenAuthenticator and
AccessTokenInterceptor when token refresh fails. The deletion was erasing
turn and preoperational data from Room, causing authenticate\(\) to treat
re-authentication as a new shift and re-request preoperacionales.

Bump version to 2.3.7 \(80\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
